description: S-sized bug fix: service swallows repo error, returns nil instead of propagating

expected_tdd_phases.red: Write test where repo returns error, assert service returns non-nil error
expected_tdd_phases.green: Change return nil, nil to return nil, fmt.Errorf("get order: %w", err)

expected_killer_hypothesis: caller receives nil error when repo fails, silently loses data
expected_boundary_items: repo returns nil order with nil error (not found)
